nasb.text: and they were for the sons of Aaron, one of the families of the Kohathites, of the sons of Levi, for the lot was theirs first.

esv.text: which went to the descendants of Aaron, one of the clans of the Kohathites who belonged to the people of Levi; since the lot fell to them first.

cnv.text: 給利未支派、哥轄家族中亞倫的子孫，因為第一籤是他們的。
